summary.western_publisher_note: 168 papers from Western/international publishers identified via CrossRef API doi-prefix matching. 7 removed as false positives during manual review with screenshots. The verified 161 are documented in western_publisher_russia_framing_verified.docx.

key_findings: 91,670 papers scanned via OpenAlex cursor pagination (2010-2026). 5,151 (5.6%) contain sovereignty-relevant signals.
LLM verification (Claude Haiku) classified 1,581 as Russia-framing, 2,131 as Ukraine-framing out of the signaled set.
Manual Stage 3 annotation of 1,605 papers confirmed 1,581 Russia-framing verdicts, yielding 98.3% LLM precision.
161 papers from Western/international publishers verified via CrossRef API (168 raw, 7 false positives removed during manual review).
Publisher identity verified by DOI prefix, not LLM-guessed journal quartiles. Old Q1=12/Q2=46 numbers were based on unreliable LLM classification and are withdrawn.
limitations: OpenAlex coverage depends on publisher metadata availability; some journals may be under-represented.
LLM verification uses abstract text only; full-text framing may differ.

Original Q1/Q2 journal rankings were LLM-guessed (Sonnet) and contained misidentifications (e.g. Russian journal matched to Wiley Prenatal Diagnosis). CrossRef publisher verification replaced this approach.
